role: IRGC-Quds Force officer; directed the 2011 Arbabsiar assassination plot against Saudi Ambassador Adel Al-Jubeir
bio: Gholam Shakuri is an [IRGC-Quds Force](/orgs/irgc-quds-force) officer and the principal operational director of the [2011 plot to assassinate Saudi Ambassador Adel al-Jubeir](/events/arbabsiar-plot-2011) in Washington DC. A Tehran-based officer, Shakuri recruited his cousin [Manssor Arbabsiar](/people/manssor-arbabsiar) — an Iranian-American with no intelligence background — and directed him to arrange the killing through what both believed was a Mexican drug cartel. US prosecutors identified Shakuri as reporting to [Abdul Reza Shahlai](/people/abdul-reza-shahlai), a senior IRGC-QF officer. Shakuri is listed on the FBI's wanted list and subject to US Treasury sanctions. He remains at large in Iran.
editorial_notes: FBI wanted. Indicted October 2011. Reported to Abdul Reza Shahlai per US prosecutors. Remains in Iran. Cousin of Arbabsiar.
